value.found_quote: The Claude Console features an Evaluation tool that allows you to test your prompts under various scenarios... If you update your original prompt text, you can re-run the entire eval suite against the new prompt to see how changes affect performance across all test cases.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Anthropic's Evaluation Tool available in the Claude Console, which allows users to run evaluations and test suites (test cases) against prompt/agent behavior. Features described include creating test cases, running eval suites, side-by-side comparison of prompt outputs, quality grading, and prompt versioning — all of which constitute a testing harness for evaluating agent behavior. The page presents this as a currently available, active feature with no indication of preview or deprecation.
